DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT/DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF HAS FILED A DISMISSAL. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CIVIL SERVICE COMMISSION OF THE CITY AND COUNTY'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION IS SUSTAINED. (CCP 430.10(C).) THERE IS ANOTHER ACTION PENDING, BOREEN V. CCSF (CASE NO. CPF-10-510259), BETWEEN THE SAME PARTIES ON THE SAME CAUSE OF ACTION. THE INSTANT ACTION, BOREEN V. CCSF (CASE NO. CPF-10-510336), IS STAYED PENDING THE DISPOSITION OF THE EARLIER ACTION BOREEN V. CCSF (CASE NO. CPF-10-510259). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Boreen, 415-564-1514 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Chrsitine Van Aken, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4700 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Parties report that Plaintiff has filed a Dismissal. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT/DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Dismiss.

Off calendar. Plaintiff has filed a Dismissal.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: daniel boreen, petitioner in pro per.
vince chhabria, deputy city attorney, 415.554.4700, for respondent city and county of san francisco.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and CIVIL SERVICE COMMISSION OF THE CITY AND COUNTY'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is Sustained. (CCP 430.10(c).) There is another action pending, Boreen v. CCSF (case no. CPF-10-510259), between the same parties on the same cause of action. The instant action, Boreen v. CCSF (case no. CPF-10-510336), is stayed pending the disposition of the earlier action Boreen v. CCSF (case no. CPF-10-510259). Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
